# 카테고리별 레시피

## Agent Patterns

- [Async multi-agent orchestration](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/patterns/agents/async_multi_agent_orchestration.ipynb) - Two async multi-agent patterns — a fixed N-agent team with peer messaging through a shared hub, and dynamically spawned async subagents — reduced to their bare messaging and lifecycle mechanics.
- [Automatic context compaction](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/tool_use/automatic-context-compaction.ipynb) - Manage context limits in long-running agentic workflows by automatically compressing conversation history.
- [Basic workflows](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/patterns/agents/basic_workflows.ipynb) - Three simple multi-LLM workflow patterns trading cost or latency for improved performance.
- [Building a session browser](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/claude_agent_sdk/05_Building_a_session_browser.ipynb) - List, read, rename, tag, and fork Agent SDK sessions on disk to build a conversation history sidebar without writing a transcript parser.
- [Claude 3 RAG agents with LangChain v1](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/third_party/Pinecone/claude_3_rag_agent.ipynb) - Build RAG agents with Claude 3 using LangChain v1's updated agent framework patterns.
- [Context engineering: memory, compaction, and tool clearing](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/tool_use/context_engineering/context_engineering_tools.ipynb) - Compare context engineering strategies for long-running agents and learn when each applies, what it costs, and how they compose.
- [Creating a customer service agent with client-side tools](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/tool_use/customer_service_agent.ipynb) - Build customer service chatbot with Claude using tools for customer lookup and order management.
- [Evaluator optimizer](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/patterns/agents/evaluator_optimizer.ipynb) - Workflow pattern using one LLM for generation and another for evaluation feedback loop.
- [Memory & context management with Claude Sonnet 4.6](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/tool_use/memory_cookbook.ipynb) - Build AI agents with persistent memory using Claude's memory tool and context editing.
- [Migrating from the OpenAI Agents SDK](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/claude_agent_sdk/04_migrating_from_openai_agents_sdk.ipynb) - Port an OpenAI Agents SDK app to the Claude Agent SDK, mapping each primitive (tools, guardrails, sessions, handoffs) through a single expense-approval agent example.
- [Multi-document agents](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/third_party/LlamaIndex/Multi_Document_Agents.ipynb) - Build RAG for large document collections using DocumentAgents with ReAct Agent pattern.
- [Orchestrator workers](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/patterns/agents/orchestrator_workers.ipynb) - Central LLM dynamically delegates tasks to worker LLMs and synthesizes their combined results.
- [ReAct agent](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/third_party/LlamaIndex/ReAct_Agent.ipynb) - Create ReAct agents with LlamaIndex for tool-based reasoning and action workflows.
- [Session memory compaction](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/misc/session_memory_compaction.ipynb) - Manage long-running Claude conversations with instant session memory compaction using background threading and prompt caching.
- [The chief of staff agent](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/claude_agent_sdk/01_The_chief_of_staff_agent.ipynb) - Build multi-agent systems with subagents, hooks, output styles, and plan mode features.
- [The observability agent](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/claude_agent_sdk/02_The_observability_agent.ipynb) - Connect agents to external systems via MCP servers for GitHub monitoring and CI workflows.
- [The one-liner research agent](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/claude_agent_sdk/00_The_one_liner_research_agent.ipynb) - Build a research agent using Claude Code SDK with WebSearch for autonomous research.
- [The site reliability agent](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/claude_agent_sdk/03_The_site_reliability_agent.ipynb) - Build an incident response agent with read-write MCP tools for autonomous diagnosis, remediation, and post-mortem documentation.
- [Threat intelligence enrichment agent](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/tool_use/threat_intel_enrichment_agent.ipynb) - Build an agent that autonomously investigates IOCs by querying multiple threat intel sources, cross-referencing findings, mapping to MITRE ATT&CK, and producing structured reports for SIEM and SOAR integration.
- [Using Haiku as a sub-agent](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/multimodal/using_sub_agents.ipynb) - Analyze financial reports using Haiku sub-agents for extraction and Opus for synthesis.

## Billing

- [Classifier fallback and billing for Claude Fable 5](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/fable_5_fallback_billing/guide.ipynb) - Detect safety classifier blocks on Fable 5 and fall back to Opus 4.8 with server-side or SDK-based client-side fallback, including streaming behavior and the new billing changes.

## Claude Agent SDK

- [Building a session browser](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/claude_agent_sdk/05_Building_a_session_browser.ipynb) - List, read, rename, tag, and fork Agent SDK sessions on disk to build a conversation history sidebar without writing a transcript parser.
- [Hosting your agent](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/claude_agent_sdk/07_Hosting_the_agent.ipynb) - Deploy the research agent from notebook 00 through three tiers of operational maturity (Docker, Modal, Kubernetes) with the same container image and HTTP interface at every tier.
- [Migrating from the OpenAI Agents SDK](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/claude_agent_sdk/04_migrating_from_openai_agents_sdk.ipynb) - Port an OpenAI Agents SDK app to the Claude Agent SDK, mapping each primitive (tools, guardrails, sessions, handoffs) through a single expense-approval agent example.
- [The chief of staff agent](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/claude_agent_sdk/01_The_chief_of_staff_agent.ipynb) - Build multi-agent systems with subagents, hooks, output styles, and plan mode features.
- [The observability agent](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/claude_agent_sdk/02_The_observability_agent.ipynb) - Connect agents to external systems via MCP servers for GitHub monitoring and CI workflows.
- [The one-liner research agent](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/claude_agent_sdk/00_The_one_liner_research_agent.ipynb) - Build a research agent using Claude Code SDK with WebSearch for autonomous research.
- [The site reliability agent](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/claude_agent_sdk/03_The_site_reliability_agent.ipynb) - Build an incident response agent with read-write MCP tools for autonomous diagnosis, remediation, and post-mortem documentation.
- [The vulnerability detection agent](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/claude_agent_sdk/06_The_vulnerability_detection_agent.ipynb) - Build a vulnerability-discovery agent with the Claude Agent SDK that threat-models a C target, hunts memory-safety bugs with built-in file tools, and triages findings into a structured report.

## Claude Managed Agents

- [Build a Slack data analyst bot with Claude Managed Agents](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/managed_agents/slack_data_bot.ipynb) - Mention the bot with a CSV to get an analysis report in-thread, with multi-turn follow-ups on the same session.
- [Build a data analyst agent with Claude Managed Agents](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/managed_agents/data_analyst_agent.ipynb) - Build an analyst that turns a CSV into a narrative HTML report with interactive charts, using a sandboxed environment and file mounting.
- [Build agents that remember your users](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/managed_agents/CMA_remember_user_preferences.ipynb) - Give your Claude Managed Agents a Memory store so they learn and remember your users' preferences across multiple interactions.
- [Build an SRE incident response agent with Claude Managed Agents](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/managed_agents/sre_incident_responder.ipynb) - Wire Claude into your on-call flow: when an alert fires, the agent reads logs and runbooks, pinpoints the root cause, opens a fix PR, and waits for your approval before merging.
- [Managed Agents tutorial: iterate on a failing test suite](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/managed_agents/CMA_iterate_fix_failing_tests.ipynb) - Entry-point tutorial for the Claude Managed Agents API. Walks through agent / environment / session creation, file mounts, and the streaming event loop by getting an agent to fix three planted bugs in a calc.py package.
- [Managed Agents tutorial: production setup](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/managed_agents/CMA_operate_in_production.ipynb) - End-to-end production story for Managed Agents — vault-backed MCP credentials, the session.status_idled webhook pattern for human-in-the-loop without long-lived connections, and the resource lifecycle CRUD verbs.
- [Managed Agents tutorial: prompt versioning and rollback](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/managed_agents/CMA_prompt_versioning_and_rollback.ipynb) - Server-side prompt versioning — create v1, evaluate against a labelled test set, ship v2, detect a regression, roll back by pinning sessions to version 1. Covers agents.update, version pinning on sessions.create, and where the review gate moves when prompts are not code.
- [Multiagent: coordinate a specialist team](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/managed_agents/CMA_coordinate_specialist_team.ipynb) - Heterogeneous team via the multiagent coordinator config — a coordinator runs three specialists (web-search researcher, file-reading librarian, rules-based pricer) with scoped toolsets to assemble a sales proposal. Covers the multiagent field, the thread_created / thread_message_received event types, and per-role tool scoping.
- [Outcomes: agents that verify their own work](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/managed_agents/CMA_verify_with_outcome_grader.ipynb) - Build a grade-and-revise loop with Outcomes: a writer drafts a cited research brief, a stateless grader fetches every URL and checks every quote against a rubric, and feedback drives revisions until the brief passes. Covers user.define_outcome, the span.outcome_evaluation_* events, and how to write a rubric the grader can act on.

- [Managed Agents tutorial: prompt versioning and rollback](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/managed_agents/CMA_prompt_versioning_and_rollback.ipynb) - Server-side prompt versioning — create v1, evaluate against a labelled test set, ship v2, detect a regression, roll back by pinning sessions to version 1. Covers agents.update, version pinning on sessions.create, and where the review gate moves when prompts are not code.

Covers user.define_outcome, the span.outcome_evaluation_* events, and how to write a rubric the grader can act on.

- [Retrieval-augmented generation using Pinecone](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/third_party/Pinecone/rag_using_pinecone.ipynb) - Connect Claude with Pinecone vector database for retrieval-augmented generation and semantic search.

- [Transcribe an audio file with Deepgram & use Anthropic to prepare interview questions!](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/third_party/Deepgram/prerecorded_audio.ipynb) - Transcribe audio with Deepgram and generate interview questions using Claude for preparation.
- [Using the Wolfram Alpha LLM API as a tool with Claude](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/third_party/WolframAlpha/using_llm_api.ipynb) - Integrate Wolfram Alpha LLM API as Claude tool for computational queries and answers.

## RAG & Retrieval

- ["Uploading" PDFs to Claude via the API](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/misc/pdf_upload_summarization.ipynb) - Process and summarize PDF documents using Claude API with text extraction and encoding.
- [Citations](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/misc/using_citations.ipynb) - Enable Claude to provide detailed source citations when answering document-based questions for verification.
- [Classification with Claude](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/capabilities/classification/guide.ipynb) - Build classification systems with Claude using RAG and chain-of-thought for insurance tickets.
- [Claude 3 RAG agents with LangChain v1](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/third_party/Pinecone/claude_3_rag_agent.ipynb) - Build RAG agents with Claude 3 using LangChain v1's updated agent framework patterns.
- [Enhancing RAG with contextual retrieval](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/capabilities/contextual-embeddings/guide.ipynb) - Improve RAG accuracy by adding context to chunks before embedding with prompt caching.
- [How to build a RAG system using Claude 3 and MongoDB](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/third_party/MongoDB/rag_using_mongodb.ipynb) - Build chatbot RAG system with Claude and MongoDB using tech news as knowledge base.
- [How to make SQL queries with Claude](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/misc/how_to_make_sql_queries.ipynb) - Generate SQL queries from natural language questions using Claude with database schema context.
- [Knowledge graph construction with Claude](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/capabilities/knowledge_graph/guide.ipynb) - Build knowledge graphs from unstructured text using Claude for entity extraction, relation mining, deduplication, and multi-hop graph querying.
- [Multi-document agents](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/third_party/LlamaIndex/Multi_Document_Agents.ipynb) - Build RAG for large document collections using DocumentAgents with ReAct Agent pattern.
- [RAG pipeline with LlamaIndex](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/third_party/LlamaIndex/Basic_RAG_With_LlamaIndex.ipynb) - Build basic RAG pipeline with LlamaIndex for document retrieval and question answering.
- [Retrieval augmented generation](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/capabilities/retrieval_augmented_generation/guide.ipynb) - Build and optimize RAG systems with Claude using summary indexing and reranking techniques.
- [Retrieval-augmented generation using Pinecone](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/third_party/Pinecone/rag_using_pinecone.ipynb) - Connect Claude with Pinecone vector database for retrieval-augmented generation and semantic search.
- [RouterQuery engine](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/third_party/LlamaIndex/Router_Query_Engine.ipynb) - Route queries to different indices using LlamaIndex RouterQueryEngine for multi-document search.
- [SubQuestionQueryEngine](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/third_party/LlamaIndex/SubQuestion_Query_Engine.ipynb) - Decompose complex queries into sub-questions across multiple documents using LlamaIndex engine.
- [Summarization with Claude](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/capabilities/summarization/guide.ipynb) - Comprehensive guide to summarizing legal documents with evaluation and advanced techniques.
- [Summarizing web page content with Claude 3 Haiku](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/misc/read_web_pages_with_haiku.ipynb) - Fetch and summarize web page content using Claude 3 Haiku via URL extraction.
- [Text to SQL with Claude](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/capabilities/text_to_sql/guide.ipynb) - Convert natural language queries to SQL using RAG, chain-of-thought, and self-improvement techniques.
- [Tool search with embeddings](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/tool_use/tool_search_with_embeddings.ipynb) - Scale Claude applications to thousands of tools using semantic embeddings for dynamic tool discovery.

## Responses

- [Batch processing with Message Batches API](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/misc/batch_processing.ipynb) - Process large volumes of Claude requests asynchronously with 50% cost reduction using batches.
- [Building a moderation filter with Claude](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/misc/building_moderation_filter.ipynb) - Build customizable content moderation filters by defining rules and categories in prompts.
- [Citations](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/misc/using_citations.ipynb) - Enable Claude to provide detailed source citations when answering document-based questions for verification.
- [Classifier fallback and billing for Claude Fable 5](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/fable_5_fallback_billing/guide.ipynb) - Detect safety classifier blocks on Fable 5 and fall back to Opus 4.8 with server-side or SDK-based client-side fallback, including streaming behavior and the new billing changes.
- [Extracting structured JSON using Claude and tool use](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/tool_use/extracting_structured_json.ipynb) - Extract structured JSON data from various inputs using Claude's tool use capabilities.
- [Metaprompt](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/misc/metaprompt.ipynb) - Prompt engineering tool that generates starting prompts for your tasks to solve blank-page problem.
- [Prompt caching through the Claude API](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/misc/prompt_caching.ipynb) - Cache and reuse prompt context for cost savings and faster responses with detailed instructions.
- [Prompting Claude for "JSON mode"](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/misc/how_to_enable_json_mode.ipynb) - Get reliable JSON output from Claude using effective prompting techniques without constrained sampling.
- [Prompting for frontend aesthetics](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/coding/prompting_for_frontend_aesthetics.ipynb) - Guide to prompting Claude for distinctive, polished frontend designs avoiding generic aesthetics.
- [Sampling responses from Claude beyond the max tokens limit](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/misc/sampling_past_max_tokens.ipynb) - Generate longer responses beyond max_tokens limit using prefill technique with message continuation.
- [Session memory compaction](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/misc/session_memory_compaction.ipynb) - Manage long-running Claude conversations with instant session memory compaction using background threading and prompt caching.
- [Speculative prompt caching](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/misc/speculative_prompt_caching.ipynb) - Reduce time-to-first-token by warming cache speculatively while users formulate their queries.
- [Summarization with Claude](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/capabilities/summarization/guide.ipynb) - Comprehensive guide to summarizing legal documents with evaluation and advanced techniques.

## Safeguards

- [Classifier fallback and billing for Claude Fable 5](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/fable_5_fallback_billing/guide.ipynb) - Detect safety classifier blocks on Fable 5 and fall back to Opus 4.8 with server-side or SDK-based client-side fallback, including streaming behavior and the new billing changes.

## Skills

- [Building custom Skills for Claude](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/skills/notebooks/03_skills_custom_development.ipynb) - Create, deploy, and manage custom skills extending Claude with specialized organizational workflows.
- [Claude Skills for financial applications](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/skills/notebooks/02_skills_financial_applications.ipynb) - Build financial dashboards and portfolio analytics using Claude's Excel, PowerPoint, PDF skills.
- [Introduction to Claude Skills](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/skills/notebooks/01_skills_introduction.ipynb) - Create documents, analyze data, automate workflows with Claude's Excel, PowerPoint, PDF skills.
- [Prompting for frontend aesthetics](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/coding/prompting_for_frontend_aesthetics.ipynb) - Guide to prompting Claude for distinctive, polished frontend designs avoiding generic aesthetics.

## Thinking

- [Extended thinking](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/extended_thinking/extended_thinking.ipynb) - Use Claude's extended thinking for transparent step-by-step reasoning with budget management.
- [Extended thinking with tool use](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/extended_thinking/extended_thinking_with_tool_use.ipynb) - Combine extended thinking with tools for transparent reasoning during multi-step workflows.

## Tools

- [Automatic context compaction](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/tool_use/automatic-context-compaction.ipynb) - Manage context limits in long-running agentic workflows by automatically compressing conversation history.
- [Build a data analyst agent with Claude Managed Agents](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/managed_agents/data_analyst_agent.ipynb) - Build an analyst that turns a CSV into a narrative HTML report with interactive charts, using a sandboxed environment and file mounting.
- [Build agents that remember your users](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/managed_agents/CMA_remember_user_preferences.ipynb) - Give your Claude Managed Agents a Memory store so they learn and remember your users' preferences across multiple interactions.
- [Context engineering: memory, compaction, and tool clearing](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/tool_use/context_engineering/context_engineering_tools.ipynb) - Compare context engineering strategies for long-running agents and learn when each applies, what it costs, and how they compose.
- [Creating a customer service agent with client-side tools](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/tool_use/customer_service_agent.ipynb) - Build customer service chatbot with Claude using tools for customer lookup and order management.
- [Extended thinking with tool use](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/extended_thinking/extended_thinking_with_tool_use.ipynb) - Combine extended thinking with tools for transparent reasoning during multi-step workflows.
- [Extracting structured JSON using Claude and tool use](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/tool_use/extracting_structured_json.ipynb) - Extract structured JSON data from various inputs using Claude's tool use capabilities.
- [Giving Claude a crop tool for better image analysis](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/multimodal/crop_tool.ipynb) - Give Claude a crop tool to zoom into image regions for detailed analysis of charts, documents, and diagrams.
- [Knowledge graph construction with Claude](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/capabilities/knowledge_graph/guide.ipynb) - Build knowledge graphs from unstructured text using Claude for entity extraction, relation mining, deduplication, and multi-hop graph querying.
- [Managed Agents tutorial: iterate on a failing test suite](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/managed_agents/CMA_iterate_fix_failing_tests.ipynb) - Entry-point tutorial for the Claude Managed Agents API. Walks through agent / environment / session creation, file mounts, and the streaming event loop by getting an agent to fix three planted bugs in a calc.py package.
- [Memory & context management with Claude Sonnet 4.6](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/tool_use/memory_cookbook.ipynb) - Build AI agents with persistent memory using Claude's memory tool and context editing.
- [Multiagent: coordinate a specialist team](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/managed_agents/CMA_coordinate_specialist_team.ipynb) - Heterogeneous team via the multiagent coordinator config — a coordinator runs three specialists (web-search researcher, file-reading librarian, rules-based pricer) with scoped toolsets to assemble a sales proposal. Covers the multiagent field, the thread_created / thread_message_received event types, and per-role tool scoping.
- [Note-saving tool with Pydantic and Anthropic tool use](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/tool_use/tool_use_with_pydantic.ipynb) - Create validated tools using Pydantic models for type-safe Claude tool use interactions.
- [Parallel tool calls on Claude 3.7 Sonnet](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/tool_use/parallel_tools.ipynb) - Enable parallel tool calls on Claude 3.7 Sonnet using batch tool meta-pattern workaround.
- [Programmatic tool calling (PTC)](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/tool_use/programmatic_tool_calling_ptc.ipynb) - Reduce latency and token consumption by letting Claude write code that calls tools programmatically in the code execution environment.
- [ReAct agent](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/third_party/LlamaIndex/ReAct_Agent.ipynb) - Create ReAct agents with LlamaIndex for tool-based reasoning and action workflows.
- [Threat intelligence enrichment agent](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/tool_use/threat_intel_enrichment_agent.ipynb) - Build an agent that autonomously investigates IOCs by querying multiple threat intel sources, cross-referencing findings, mapping to MITRE ATT&CK, and producing structured reports for SIEM and SOAR integration.
- [Tool choice](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/tool_use/tool_choice.ipynb) - Control how Claude selects tools using tool_choice parameter for forced or auto selection.
- [Tool search with embeddings](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/tool_use/tool_search_with_embeddings.ipynb) - Scale Claude applications to thousands of tools using semantic embeddings for dynamic tool discovery.
- [Using a calculator tool with Claude](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/tool_use/calculator_tool.ipynb) - Provide Claude with calculator tool for arithmetic operations and mathematical problem solving.
- [Using the Wolfram Alpha LLM API as a tool with Claude](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/third_party/WolframAlpha/using_llm_api.ipynb) - Integrate Wolfram Alpha LLM API as Claude tool for computational queries and answers.
- [Using vision with tools](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/tool_use/vision_with_tools.ipynb) - Combine Claude's vision with tools to extract structured data from images like nutrition labels.
